title: HNTAS: Existing heat networks - draft technical specifications for Milestone 4
body: "These draft technical specifications for existing heat networks detail the requirements and technical obligations to be fulfilled at Milestone 4 as part of the upcoming Heat Network Technical Assurance Scheme (HNTAS). They cover the requirements to achieve HNTAS Certification 1, including:   technical requirements to be met  performance monitoring requirements to be met  key failures to be avoided evidence requirements to be provided to demonstrate conformity with HNTAS    They are for use by:   heat network operators organisations within the heat network supply chain   These technical specifications correspond to the draft HNTAS assessment procedures for Milestone 4.  Next steps  We will be requesting feedback on the information in these documents. We will run a change management process in parallel with the HNTAS technical standards consultation which will launch shortly.  We will make final versions of these documents available before the scheme starts.  "
